items.caption: A person wearing a maroon t-shirt with the text "zubizaretta" printed in white capital letters across the chest. below this, there is a list of names in white text, which are likely the names of players from a soccer team, specifically "puyol," "koeman," "cruyff," "guardiola," "messi," "xavi," "ronaldo," "kubala," "iniesta," and "zubizaretta" again. the person is smiling and appears to be standing against a plain background. the t-shirt is designed to resemble a sports jersey, suggesting it is a fan's item related to the mentioned players or team.
